4036.issue: [S4036] Consider adding .vscode/settings.json file with JSON schema definitions for better development experience with Visual Studio Code.

5042.issue: [W5042] Package "react" is used in source files but not found in dependencies of [package.json](https://github.com/iobroker-community-adapters/ioBroker.plex/blob/master/package.json). Dependency might be missing.

5050.issue: [E5050] process.exit() used in  (src/lib/library.ts, tasks.ts). This is incompatible with compact mode as it terminates the entire host process. Remove process.exit() or set common.compact to false at [io-package.json](https://github.com/iobroker-community-adapters/ioBroker.plex/blob/master/io-package.json).

5051.issue: [S5051] Custom sleep/wait function(s) found in source files (src/main.ts). Consider using the built-in "this.delay()" method provided by the ioBroker adapter base class instead.

6022.issue: [S6022] CHANGELOG_OLD.md exists but no link to it was found in [README.md](https://github.com/iobroker-community-adapters/ioBroker.plex/blob/master/README.md). Consider adding a link to CHANGELOG_OLD.md at the end of the Changelog section.

8004.issue: [W8004] Please process PR [[#546] "[iobroker-bot] Add CHANGELOG_OLD.md to store older changelog entries"](https://github.com/iobroker-community-adapters/ioBroker.plex/issues/546)

8905.issue: [W8905] Repository contains [package.json](https://github.com/iobroker-community-adapters/ioBroker.plex/blob/master/package.json) files in non-root directories (e.g. /src-admin/package.json, /src-www/package.json). Dependabot may miss updates unless the "npm" ecosystem entry uses "directories: ['**/*']" instead of "directory: '/'"

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^24.12.3" at [package.json](https://github.com/iobroker-community-adapters/ioBroker.plex/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 22. Downgrade to node.js 22.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
